item.title: This Interview RUINED her campaign. The Orange Man makes his COMEBACK.
item.itunes:title: This Interview RUINED her campaign. The Orange Man makes his COMEBACK.
item.itunes:author: 好機車
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z0BrFaBPD0w In a dramatic turn of events, Kamala Harris's recent interview—her first in nearly 40 days—unfolded as a high-stakes fiasco. Scheduled on CNN, the interview was expected to be a safe platform with soft questions designed to polish her public image. Instead, Harris's responses led to a fiery backlash, with the interview garnering over 35,000 dislikes—almost triple the number of likes it received. This may be the most cringe-worthy interview you've ever witnessed. Meanwhile, Donald Trump appears to be recalibrating his approach as he gears up for the final stretch of the presidential race. In a surprising move that aligns with our earlier suggestions, Trump might be setting the stage for a potential comeback. Buckle up for a front-row seat to the ultimate showdown: the Angry Orange Man versus the Joyful Word Salad Warrior. FOLLOW ME https://linktr.ee/SONAEYAMBE FB: https://facebook.com/GOODBIKEMOB #kamalaharris #donaldtrumpnews #election2024 #cnn #川普
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z0BrFaBPD0w In a dramatic turn of events, Kamala Harris's recent interview—her first in nearly 40 days—unfolded as a high-stakes fiasco. Scheduled on CNN, the interview was expected to be a safe platform with soft questions designed to polish her public image. Instead, Harris's responses led to a fiery backlash, with the interview garnering over 35,000 dislikes—almost triple the number of likes it received. This may be the most cringe-worthy interview you've ever witnessed. Meanwhile, Donald Trump appears to be recalibrating his approach as he gears up for the final stretch of the presidential race. In a surprising move that aligns with our earlier suggestions, Trump might be setting the stage for a potential comeback. Buckle up for a front-row seat to the ultimate showdown: the Angry Orange Man versus the Joyful Word Salad Warrior. item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z0BrFaBPD0w In a dramatic turn of events, Kamala Harris's recent interview—her first in nearly 40 days—unfolded as a high-stakes fiasco. Scheduled on CNN, the interview was expected to be a safe platform with soft questions designed to polish her public image. Instead, Harris's responses led to a fiery backlash, with the interview garnering over 35,000 dislikes—almost triple the number of likes it received. This may be the most cringe-worthy interview you've ever witnessed. Meanwhile, Donald Trump appears to be recalibrating his approach as he gears up for the final stretch of the presidential race. In a surprising move that aligns with our earlier suggestions, Trump might be setting the stage for a potential comeback. Buckle up for a front-row seat to the ultimate showdown: the Angry Orange Man versus the Joyful Word Salad Warrior. item.title: Deadpool and Gossip Girl RUINED his Movie? #itendswithusmovie
item.itunes:title: Deadpool and Gossip Girl RUINED his Movie? #itendswithusmovie
item.itunes:author: 好機車
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GXKq2MxPSzI Blake Lively, who plays one of the leading roles in the popular TV series Gossip Girl, plays a kind-hearted, charming and understanding character. She recently filmed a movie, The End With Ue, which is The strange publicity method made netizens dig up a shocking incident. Blake Lively and her husband, actor Ryan Reynolds, who plays Deadpool, ignored and excluded director and protagonist Justin Baldoni, and even hired their own editor to cut out the movie they wanted. The video, as well as having Ryan Reynolds rewrite several scenes of the script and lines, made many netizens wonder if she had gone too far, and dug up videos of her bullying the interviewer during interviews in the past. This series of events made Blake Lively has plummeted, even to Ryan Reynolds. Prepare your popcorn and let us watch this Hollywood gossip incident. ============================================== Download Raid: Shadow Legends for free on iOS/Android/PC 👉 \"http://pl.go-ga.me/ayjm383z\" and get two powerful epic heroes + one legendary hero! ✅1 - Get the epic hero Tagor immediately after downloading ✅2 - Obtain the epic hero Tyrael after reaching level 15 ✅3 - From August 21st to October 23rd, log in for 7 consecutive days to get the legendary hero Loki! ️ 💥You can only get these rewards by downloading Raid: Legend of Shadows through my link! ============================================== Socials: https://linktr.ee/SONAEYAMBE FB: https://facebook.com/GOODBIKEMOB 聯絡信箱: goodbikemob@gmail.com #deadpool #deadpool3 #gossipgirl #ryanreynolds #itendswithusmovie

item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GXKq2MxPSzI Blake Lively, who plays one of the leading roles in the popular TV series Gossip Girl, plays a kind-hearted, charming and understanding character. She recently filmed a movie, The End With Ue, which is The strange publicity method made netizens dig up a shocking incident. Blake Lively and her husband, actor Ryan Reynolds, who plays Deadpool, ignored and excluded director and protagonist Justin Baldoni, and even hired their own editor to cut out the movie they wanted. The video, as well as having Ryan Reynolds rewrite several scenes of the script and lines, made many netizens wonder if she had gone too far, and dug up videos of her bullying the interviewer during interviews in the past. This series of events made Blake Lively has plummeted, even to Ryan Reynolds. item.title: The Democratic Party is DEAD. RFK Jr. Wages WAR. Endorses Trump
item.itunes:title: The Democratic Party is DEAD. RFK Jr. Wages WAR. Endorses Trump
item.itunes:author: 好機車
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3k6jcBegffk Presidential candidate Robert F. Kennedy Jr. recently went scorched earth on the Democratic Party and endorsed Trump following the suspension of his campaign. In a 90 minute press conference he called out the Democratic Party, Kamala Harris, Joe Biden and the mainstream media. Find out what exactly happened to inspire this shocking turn of events in today's episode. Socials: https://linktr.ee/SONAEYAMBE FB: https://facebook.com/GOODBIKEMOB #rfkjr #robertfkennedyjr #trump #donaldtrumpnews #kamalaharris #賀錦麗
